writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe your childhood
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing what you were like as a child, using was/were.
writing.sampleAnswer: When I was a child, I was very shy and I wasn't interested in sports. My best friend and I were in the same class for years.
checklist: Dùng was/were đúng theo chủ ngữ
Có ít nhất 1 câu phủ định (wasn't/weren't)
Mô tả rõ tính cách hoặc trải nghiệm thời nhỏ

writing.title: Writing Task 1: Describe a past trip
writing.prompt: Write a short paragraph (about 40 words) describing a trip you took, using Past Simple regular verbs (-ed).
writing.sampleAnswer: Last summer, I visited Hoi An with my family. We booked a small hotel and stayed for four days. We explored the old streets every evening.
checklist: Dùng ít nhất 4 động từ có quy tắc (-ed)
Có mốc thời gian rõ ràng (last summer...)
Câu văn theo trình tự hợp lý
